data:
## WMT+OR+Walmart Google News, from 2026-02-13 to 2026-02-20:

### Walmart's first earnings under John Furner show resilient demand (source: Axios) 

AxiosWalmart's first earnings under John Furner show resilient demandThe earnings suggest shoppers are still prioritizing price and convenience..1 day ago
